events.name: Placed under guardianship of Sir William de Legh
Adam's father died when he was 8 yrs old.
Placed in wardship of Henry Bradshaw
co-heir [and nephew] of Richard Wettenhall of Acton and Dorfold
Writ concerning damage done by their [Adam Bostock & Richard Manley] enclosure of lands
Feud w Stpehen (Abbot of Vale Royal)
Battle of Shrewsbury (rebelled against King Henry IV)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Bostock於1363年8月15日出生在英國爾保斯托時，他的父親Sir Adam De Bostock38歲，母親Margaret Whetenhall38歲。他和Jonet Bradshaw至少有5個兒子和6個女兒。他於1404年被列為lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality。他去世於1415年6月2日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Bostock于1363年8月15日出生在英国爾保斯托时，他的父亲Sir Adam De Bostock38岁，母亲Margaret Whetenhall38岁。他和Jonet Bradshaw至少有5个儿子和6个女儿。他于1404年被列为lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality。他去世于1415年6月2日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Bostock was born on 15 August 1363, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Adam De Bostock, was 38 and his mother, Margaret Whetenhall, was 38. He had at least 5 sons and 6 daughters with Jonet Bradshaw. In 1404, his occupation is listed as lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality. He died on 2 June 1415, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Bostock est né le 15 août 1363, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adam De Bostock, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whetenhall, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles avec Jonet Bradshaw. En 1404, sa profession de son indiquée est lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Bostock am 15. August 1363 in Bostock, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam De Bostock 38 und seine Mutter Margaret Whetenhall 38. Er hatte mit Jonet Bradshaw mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1404 ist sein Beruf als lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. Juni 1415 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Bostock è nato il il 15 agosto 1363 nel Bostock, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Adam De Bostock, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Whetenhall, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie con Jonet Bradshaw. Nel 1404, la sua occupazione è indicata come lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality. Morì il 2 giugno 1415, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Bostockが1363年8月15日にイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで生まれた時，父Sir Adam De Bostockは38歳，母Margaret Whetenhallは38歳であった。彼はJonet Bradshawとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。1404年，職業はlead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principalityと記録されている。彼は1415年6月2日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Bostock(이)가 1363년 8월 15일 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam De Bostock(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Whetenhall(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Jonet Bradshaw(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1404년, 그의 직업은 lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality이었다. 그는 1415년 6월 2일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.15 Aug 1363–2 Jun 1415: 15 de agosto de 1363–2 de junho de 1415
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Bostock nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1363, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Adam De Bostock, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whetenhall, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas com Jonet Bradshaw. Em 1404, sua profissão aparece como lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality. Ele faleceu em 2 de junho de 1415, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Bostock родился 15 августа 1363 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam De Bostock было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whetenhall, 38. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Jonet Bradshaw. В 1404 году он работал по профессии lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality. Он умер 2 июня 1415 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.15 Aug 1363–2 Jun 1415: 15 de agosto de 1363–2 de junio de 1415
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Bostock nació el 15 de agosto de 1363, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Adam De Bostock, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret Whetenhall, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas con Jonet Bradshaw. En 1404, su ocupación registrada era lead men to the welsh borders to help quell unrest in the principality. Murió el 2 de junio de 1415, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
